meanings.definition: an order to report for military duty

examples: The case was called up in court

meanings.definition: get or try to get into communication (with someone) by telephone
examples: I tried to call you all night
Take two aspirin and call me in the morning

meanings.definition: recall knowledge from memory; have a recollection
examples: I can't remember saying any such thing
I can't think what her last name was
can you remember her phone number?
Do you remember that he once loved you?

meanings.definition: call to arms; of military personnel
